title: Spicy Stir Fry Dumplings
description: Quick and easy to make, these dumplings are filled with a flavorful spicy mixture and fried to perfection.

ingredients.name: Spicy mixture
ingredients.notes: filling ingredients can be adjusted to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add scallions and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add spicy mixture and cook for 2 minutes.
Wrap dum wrappers around the spicy mixture and seal the edges.
Fry the dumplings in batches until golden brown.
Drain the dumplings on paper towels.
